texto: John’s voice cracked when he answered, and she could hear the pain seeping in no matter how hard he tried to cover it. “What if I lose focus? What if I lose you?” he asked. Katelyn framed his face with her hands and kissed him softly. “You won’t,” she said against his lips. “You won’t lose me.” He just wrapped himself around her, kissing her with his drugging kisses.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lori Ryan que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “John’s voice cracked when he answered, and she could hear the pain seeping in no matter how hard …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, everlasting, lori-ryan, com foco em lori-ryan e romantic.
